mapper.select: SELECT address_id, address, address2, district, city_id, postal_code, phone, last_update FROM address ORDER BY address_id
SELECT address_id, address, address2, district, city_id, postal_code, phone, last_update FROM address WHERE address_id = #{addressId}
SELECT address_id, address, address2, district, city_id, postal_code, phone, last_update FROM address WHERE city_id = #{cityId} ORDER BY address
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO address (address, address2, district, city_id, postal_code, phone, last_update) VALUES (#{address}, #{address2}, #{district}, #{cityId}, #{postalCode}, #{phone}, COALESCE(#{lastUpdate}, now())) RETURNING address_id
mapper.update: UPDATE address SET address = #{address}, address2 = #{address2}, district = #{district}, city_id = #{cityId}, postal_code = #{postalCode}, phone = #{phone}, last_update = now() WHERE address_id = #{addressId}
